property.name: componentTitle
property.label: Component Title
property.description: Title to display at the top of the component

property.name: selectedDataGraph
property.label: Select Data Graph
property.description: Select the Real-Time Data Graph to use

property.name: lookupKey
property.label: Lookup Key
property.description: DG Lookup key value to pass to the flow. Use RECORD_ID as a placeholder for the current record ID.

property.name: autoExecute
property.label: Auto Execute on Load
property.description: Automatically execute the flow when component loads
